source_pr.title: topsql: support multiple datasinks
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Zhenchi <zhongzc_arch@outlook.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?

Part of #29020 

Problem Summary:

Now the datasink is hardcoded.

### What is changed and how it works?

Add datasink registration mechanism:
* Add `DataSinkRegHandle` method to interface `TopSQLReporter`. Users can access the registration handle provided by the reporter, then register a datasink.
* Add registration handle logic for `RemoteTopSQLReporter`.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test

### Release note

```release-note
Support multiple datasinks for TopSQL
```

symptoms: Close may be called multiple times, fix potential data race
failure_signature: Close may be called multiple times, fix potential data race
fix_pattern: Close may be called multiple times, fix potential data race

evidence: evidence: Close may be called multiple times, fix potential data race
